title: tanacetum glabra
intro: Tanacetum glabra, also known as Pyrethrum or Mexican Tarragon, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to repel insects and act as a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Tanacetum glabra include its use in treating fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used as a natural insecticide in gardening and pest control.
